evidence: LLDB attach was attempted twice but blocked because debugserver is unavailable in the environment; gdb was also unavailable. Fallback runtime capture from debugging/poc_debug proved the bad state: logical_size=2147483648, int_truncated_size=-2147483648, next_result=0, returned_size=-1, byte_count=0. This confirms ArrayInputStream truncates an oversized logical length into a negative int and immediately treats the stream as EOF.
